options.description: only show actions available on the given platform

value.name: platform
value.description: one of android, ios or mac

options.description: captures the output of the current run, and generates a markdown issue template
enables extended verbose mode. Use with caution, as this even includes ALL sensitive data. Cannot be used on CI

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: helps you with your initial fastlane setup

options.description: only iOS projects Your Apple ID

subcommands.name: swift
subcommands.description: fastlane configuration written in Swift (Beta). Swift setup is still in beta

subcommands.name: action
subcommands.description: shows more information for a specific command

subcommands.name: actions
subcommands.description: lists all available fastlane actions

subcommands.name: add_plugin
subcommands.description: add a new plugin to your fastlane setup

subcommands.name: docs
subcommands.description: generate a markdown based documentation based on the Fastfile

options.description: overwrite the existing README.md in the ./fastlane folder

subcommands.name: enable_auto_complete
subcommands.description: enable tab auto completion

options.description: add custom command(s) for which tab auto complete should be enabled too

subcommands.name: env
subcommands.description: print your fastlane environment, use this when you submit an issue on GitHub

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: display global or [command] help documentation

subcommands.name: install_plugins
subcommands.description: install all plugins for this project

subcommands.name: lanes
subcommands.description: lists all available lanes and shows their description

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: lists all available lanes without description

options.description: output the lanes in JSON instead of text

subcommands.name: new_action
subcommands.description: create a new custom action for fastlane

subcommands.name: new_plugin
subcommands.description: create a new plugin that can be used with fastlane

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: run a fastlane one-off action without a full lane

subcommands.name: search_plugins
subcommands.description: search for plugins, search query is optional

subcommands.name: socket_server
subcommands.description: starts local socket server and enables only a single local connection

options.description: keeps socket server up even after error or disconnects, requires CTRL-C to kill
sets the port on localhost for the socket connection

subcommands.name: trigger
subcommands.description: run a specific lane. Pass the lane name and optionally the platform first

options.description: prevents fastlane from attempting to update FastlaneRunner swift project
prevents fastlane from attempting to update FastlaneRunner swift project

value.name: port
value.description: set specific port to communicate between fastlane and FastlaneRunner

subcommands.name: update_fastlane
subcommands.description: update fastlane to the latest release

subcommands.name: update_plugins
subcommands.description: update all plugin dependencies
